title: BannerBoat
description: Allows you to decorate your boats with custom banners, but they can carry only one player.
body:
![Logo](https://i.postimg.cc/TwmCrSsm/bannerboat.png)
[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)]([https://discord.gg/wJxqmfRqaN](https://discord.gg/NeQWTETTbj)) 
[![kofi-idk](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-singular_64h.png)](https://ko-fi.com/kiwikcz)
# 📖 Description
This datapack lets you customize your boats by placing banners on them, giving each vessel a unique and decorative touch. Each boat can carry only one player, but the ability to add a banner allows you to distinguish your boats and make your world look more creative and detailed. Perfect for those who enjoy aesthetics and customization while sailing rivers and oceans.
